entity.label: Ariel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the chief men sent by Ezra to procure Levites for the sanctuary (Ezra 8:16).

nodes.label: Ariel
nodes.description: One of the chief men sent by Ezra to procure Levites for the sanctuary (Ezra 8:16).

verses.text: Then sent I for Eliezer, for Ariel, for Shemaiah, and for Elnathan, and for Jarib, and for Elnathan, and for Nathan, and for Zechariah, and for Meshullam, chief men; also for Joiarib, and for Elnathan, men of understanding.
